raw_consumer_statement: I made ( XXXX ) purchases to XXXX through XXXX on XX/XX/year>. I reached out to XXXX  via email as that is the only contact information they provide to confirm my purchases. I received a message back that the email address was invalid. I reached out to XXXX and asked for their assistance. XXXX directed me to file a claim with my credit card company. I filed ( XXXX ) disputes with my credit card company AMEX. Amex then filed chargebacks against XXXX. XXXX provided documents & tracking number via XXXX indicating my package was delivered to an address in the same city as my address via XXXX. I reached out to XXXX and confirmed the package was not addressed to my address via the tracking number XXXX  provided. Apparently this is a common fraud practice where the merchant will send a package to a random address in the same zip code and use this as proof of service to the credit card company. These matters remain unresolved with XXXX, XXXX & AMEX. I have submitted a Service Request to the XXXX requesting a formal report on the tracking number XXXX provided. XXXX and AMEX have not been willing to provide contact information to XXXX so that I might pursue resolution directly with them. It appears XXXX has dropped XXXX from their website. I need your assistance in bringing resolution to this matter. Thank you!
